language.label: Language
language.hint: Applies to the web interface and API error messages when supported.

auth.serverUnreachable: Could not reach the server. Check that the app is running and try again.
auth.welcomeHint: Complete setup with OpenID Connect or the administrator token from your server log.
auth.signInHintOidc: Use your identity provider, or sign in with a token.
auth.useRecoveryToken: Sign in with a recovery token
auth.tokenHintInitial: On first start the server prints a one-time token to stdout (for example container logs). Paste it here.
auth.tokenHintBootstrap: Paste the bootstrap token from BOOTSTRAP_ADMIN_TOKEN (recovery mode).
auth.tokenHintLogin: Paste an API token, OIDC ID token, or other bearer token issued for your account.
auth.settingsApiHint: API base URL can be changed later under Settings if this UI is not served from the same host as the API.
auth.oidcNotConfigured: OIDC browser login is not configured. Use an API token or ask an admin to set OIDC_ISSUER_URL, OIDC_CLIENT_ID, OIDC_REDIRECT_URI, and PUBLIC_BASE_URL.
auth.emptyOidcToken: OpenID Connect returned an empty token.
auth.oidcRejected: OpenID Connect sign-in was rejected (check server time, IdP audience, and PUBLIC_BASE_URL / ALLOWED_ORIGINS).
auth.storeSignInFailed: Could not store sign-in data (private browsing?).
auth.oidcStartFailed: Failed to start OpenID Connect login

common.confirmDeleteToken: Are you sure you want to {{action}} the token "{{label}}"?
common.expiryHint: Choose an expiry date in the future (UTC end of day).
common.confirmDeletePost: Are you sure you want to delete this post?
common.selectPostPreview: Select a post from the timeline to see how it will look on different platforms.
common.confirmDeleteMedia: Are you sure you want to delete this media?
common.rateLimit: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
common.name: Name
common.title: Title
common.selectTeamAnalytics: Select a team to view analytics.
common.selectTeamDashboard: Select a team to load the dashboard.

status.invitationAccepted: Invitation accepted — you have been added to the team.
status.apiTokenCreated: API token created. Copy the secret below; it is not stored in plain text.
status.sessionExpiredSignIn: Session expired. Sign in again to continue.
status.providerNameUrlRequired: Provider name and instance URL are required.
status.disconnectAccountsBeforeRemove: Disconnect all social accounts that use this instance before removing it.
status.confirmRemoveProviderInstance: Remove this provider instance? It will no longer appear when teams connect accounts.
status.mastodonTokenRequired: Mastodon access token is required for manual connection.
status.selectInstanceOrUrl: Select a registered instance or enter the instance URL.
status.friendicaCredentialsRequired: Friendica username and access token are required.
status.selectInstanceOrFriendicaUrl: Select a registered instance or enter the Friendica base URL.
status.blueskyCredentialsRequired: Bluesky handle and app password are required.
status.selectMastodonForOAuth: Select a registered Mastodon instance for browser login.

dashboard.noAccountsLinked: No accounts linked to this workspace yet.
dashboard.noUpcoming: No upcoming scheduled or draft posts. Create a post to fill your calendar.

analytics.totalEngagementHint: Sum of all likes, shares, and replies across all platforms.
analytics.followerTrend7dHint: Net change in followers over the last 7 days.
analytics.noPostMetrics: No engagement metrics synced for this post yet.
analytics.noPublishedPosts: No published posts yet. Metrics appear after posts are published and synced from connected accounts.
analytics.activityHeatmapHint: Engagement of published posts by publish time (local time, last 90 days).
analytics.noActivityData: No activity data yet. Metrics appear after publishing and sync.
analytics.hashtagPerformanceHint: Engagement per hashtag across published posts. The score smooths outliers so single viral posts don't dominate. Casing variants are grouped together.
analytics.noHashtags: No hashtags found in published posts yet.

accounts.connectedHint: Social accounts are attached to the team selected in the header. Use them as post destinations in the composer.
accounts.noAccounts: No accounts connected for this workspace yet.
accounts.viewOnlyHint: View-only members cannot connect or remove accounts.
accounts.selectTeamFirst: Select or create a team first.
accounts.needEditorAccess: You need editor or owner access on this workspace to connect accounts.
accounts.noInstanceRegistered: No {{provider}} instance is registered yet. Ask an administrator to add one under Admin, or use the instance URL field when the provider allows it.
accounts.mastodonOAuthHint: Browser login requires a registered Mastodon instance with OAuth. Or paste an access token below.
accounts.pixelfedMediaHint: Pixelfed posts require at least one image — attach media in the composer before scheduling.
accounts.editAccountHint: Update display name, character limit, or rotate credentials for this account.

onboarding.welcomeText: goloom organizes everything around teams: social accounts, posts, and members all live in a team. Create yours to get started — use it solo or invite others later.
onboarding.teamHint: You can rename the team and invite members at any time in the team settings.

tour.welcomeText: Let's set things up together — this takes about a minute. You can skip at any point and replay the tour later from the settings.
tour.openAdminText: As administrator you first register the platforms your teams can publish to. Open your user menu and choose "Administration".
tour.adminProvidersText: This tab manages the platform connections. Open it to see the registered providers.
tour.providerFormText: Register your server here — for example your Mastodon instance. Once a provider exists, every team can connect its accounts through it. You can do this after the tour.
tour.navAccountsText: Time to connect your accounts. Open the Accounts section.
tour.accountsConnectText: Pick the platform and sign in — the connected account becomes a publishing destination for your posts.
tour.newPostText: "New post" opens the composer: write once, preview per network, and schedule to all selected accounts.
tour.finishAdminText: That's the essentials. Two more things worth knowing: invite people by email in the team settings, and replay this tour anytime from the settings.
tour.finishUserText: That's the essentials. You can invite teammates from the team settings — and replay this tour anytime from the settings.
tour.restartHint: Replay the guided introduction to goloom's main areas.

teams.cardsHint: Each card shows members, connected accounts, and post activity for that workspace.
teams.settingsHint: Manage members, update access, and transfer ownership for {{teamName}}.
teams.memberViewHint: You are a member of this team. Only team owners can change settings here.
teams.aiAgentHint: Enable AI-powered content generation for this workspace.
teams.aiProviderHint: Configure the AI provider for this team. The API key is stored encrypted and never shown again.
teams.aiApiKeyStored: Key stored — leave empty to keep it
teams.createTeamError: Could not create the team. Please try again.
teams.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe your team's purpose and focus
teams.externalPostMonitorHint: Import original posts published outside goloom (last 30 days on first enable) and track their engagement in Analytics.
teams.importOldPostsHint: Import posts from connected social accounts into goloom. They will be included in future AI profile analysis.
teams.importOldPostsImportingHint: This may take a while for large imports.
teams.inviteHint: Invite someone who is not on the platform yet. They join this team automatically once they sign in with the invited email address.
teams.inviteLinkNote: Copy and share this link now — it is shown only once.
teams.brandingHint: Pick your team's brand color. It is used as the accent color across the app for everyone in this team.

recurring.title: Recurring posts
recurring.hint: Templates expand into scheduled posts using {year}, {month}, {day}, {counter}. Use weekly or monthly recurrence JSON (monthly_anchor_offset supports “days before” anchors).
recurring.requiredFields: Title, content, and at least one account are required.
recurring.ordinalsHint: Select one or more, e.g. 1st and 3rd Friday.
recurring.occurrencesHint: Add one row per date, e.g. 1st Friday and 3rd Monday.
recurring.summaryMonthlyAnchor: Day {{anchorDay}} plus {{offsetDays}} days each month at {{time}} ({{tz}})
recurring.noOccurrences: No occurrences found for this schedule.
recurring.regenerateIrreversibleWarning: This cannot be undone. Existing scheduled or draft posts in scope will be permanently deleted and recreated from the current template.
recurring.regenerateHorizonConfirm:
Regenerate all posts within the materialize horizon from the current template?

This cannot be undone.
recurring.regenerateOccurrenceConfirm:
Regenerate the selected occurrence from the current template?

This cannot be undone.
recurring.regenerateNoOccurrences: No regenerable occurrences found for this template.
recurring.regenerateAiQueued: AI is writing a fresh post… the calendar will update shortly.
recurring.regenerateAiFailed: AI generation failed – the post was created from the template content. ({{error}})
recurring.counterStartHint: Value used for {counter} on the next scheduled post. Increments automatically after each run.
recurring.materializeHorizonHint: Creates scheduled posts in advance so they appear in the calendar for review, editing, or deletion.
recurring.materializeHorizonActive: Pre-schedules posts up to {{days}} days ahead
recurring.aiScopeMainOnly: Main post only (announcement uses template text)
recurring.aiScopeHint: When only the main post uses AI, the generated text still follows your announcement template for tone and continuity.
recurring.aiEnhanceDescription: AI rewrites the template — fresher copy, same facts. Brand voice comes from AI Studio.
recurring.aiPromptHint: Optional: emphasis and angle (e.g. highlight a sale, casual meetup invite, live-show hype). No new facts — only what is in the template or this instruction.
recurring.aiPromptPlaceholder: e.g. Stress date and venue; warm and inviting; do not invent topics not in the template.
recurring.announcementEnabled: Post an announcement before each occurrence
recurring.announcementDifferentTargets: Use different accounts for the announcement
recurring.announcementHint: Posts automatically a fixed number of days before each main occurrence. Use {main_day}, {main_month}, {main_weekday_name} for the main event date and {main_counter} for the main post counter ({counter} is the separate announcement counter).
recurring.announcementContentRequired: Announcement content is required when announcements are enabled.
recurring.announcementTargetsRequired: Select at least one account for the announcement, or use the same targets as the main post.

review.title: Review queue
review.hint: Automation drafts (for example from RSS) waiting for your approval before publishing.

automation.title: Automation
automation.hint: Time-based recurring posts and RSS feed rules in one place. Optional AI enhancement uses the same voice engine as the composer.

rss.title: RSS feeds
rss.hint: Automatically create posts when new articles appear. Use a template, or enable AI to rewrite posts from the article text.
rss.aiPromptPlaceholder: e.g. Summarize the key takeaway and add a question for engagement.
rss.aiPromptHint: Task-specific instruction for this feed (e.g. focus on releases). Brand voice comes from AI Studio.
rss.aiRequiresTeam: Enable AI for this workspace under Team settings to use AI enhancement.
rss.promptRequired: Add AI instructions when enhancement is enabled.
rss.titleTemplateHint: Goloom post title. Default uses the RSS article title. Example: Announce #{counter}
rss.titleHintPlaceholder: e.g. Use the tool name from the article as the title
rss.titleHintHelp: When AI enhancement is on, overrides the title template if the model returns a title.
rss.templateVars: Variables: {title}, {link}, {summary}, {feed_name}, {published_date}, {counter}, plus date helpers from recurring templates.
rss.firstCheckLatest: Publish latest article once on setup
rss.selectAccounts: Select at least one target account.

calendar.createPostHint: Create a post to start building your publishing timeline.

schedule.createPostHint: Create a post to start building your publishing timeline.

archive.hint: Posted items appear here once the scheduler publishes them.

content.noScheduledMonth: No scheduled posts for this month.
content.noScheduledWorkspace: No scheduled posts for this workspace. Create a post from the schedule view or the composer.

audit.title: Audit log
audit.hint: Who — a member or an API key — did what in this team.

admin.pageSubtitle: Deployment status, configuration, providers, and user directory.
admin.overviewHint: Counts across users, teams, providers, and the post pipeline.
admin.schedulerHint: Background workers and HTTP listener from runtime configuration.
admin.failuresHint: Posts that could not be published after all retries. Inspect the error, retry, or mark as reviewed.
admin.noSyncStatus: Sync status is not available yet.
admin.syncMetricsActionHint: Runs post engagement and account follower sync in the background. Refresh after about a minute to see updated counts.
admin.configurationsHint: Security and sign-in settings loaded from the server environment (read-only).
admin.oidcConfigHint: OIDC is configured via server environment variables. Changes require a server restart.
admin.registeredUsersHint: Everyone who can sign in to this deployment.
admin.noUsers: No users returned from the directory.
admin.metricsSyncHint: Post engagement (likes, reposts) and account follower counts are pulled from connected providers on a schedule. Intervals are configured via server environment variables (SCHEDULER_METRICS_SYNC_INTERVAL, etc.).
admin.syncMetricsHint: Runs post engagement and account follower sync in the background. Refresh after about a minute to see updated counts.
admin.providerOnboardingHint: Register provider instances so teams can connect accounts.
admin.oauthAutoDiscoverHint: {{provider}} auto-discovers its OAuth endpoints from the instance URL and registers an app automatically — leave the advanced fields empty unless the instance needs a custom app.
admin.advancedConfigHint: OAuth client credentials, scopes, and token endpoints. Leave empty for automatic app registration; set them manually for custom apps or strict instances.
admin.advancedConfigNotNeeded: {{provider}} needs no extra configuration here — accounts authenticate per user.
admin.placeholderKeepSecret: Leave blank to keep existing on update
admin.disconnectBeforeRemove: Disconnect every account using this instance first
admin.confirmRemoveInstance: Are you sure you want to remove the provider instance "{{name}}"?
admin.logsHint: Recent scheduler activity captured from the structured logger. Archived entries are dimmed.

generate.titleHintPlaceholder: e.g. Name the tool being introduced
generate.titleHintHelp: The AI sets the internal Goloom post title. Leave empty for an automatic short title.

media.libraryHint: Persistent uploads for {{team}}. These files are stored on Goloom and synced to providers when you publish.
media.emptyLibrary: No media in library yet. Upload an image or video above.
media.pickerHint: Select files from your workspace library or upload a new one.
media.dropHint: or drop a file here · added to workspace library automatically
media.selectWorkspaceMedia: Select a workspace to attach media files.
media.connectForLibrary: Connect with a bearer token and pick a workspace to browse the library.
media.noFilesInLibrary: No files in the library yet. Upload one above.

composer.destinationsHint: Tap accounts to include. Per-account text tabs appear below.
composer.title: Title
composer.selectDestinationOverrides: Select at least one destination to add per-account text overrides.
composer.placeholderOverride: Leave aligned with default, or type a custom version for this account.
composer.skipAttachmentHint: Uncheck to skip an attachment only for this account.
composer.requiresMediaHint: {{names}} requires at least one image. Attach media before scheduling.
composer.selectDestinationPreviews: Select a destination to see previews.
composer.aiOptimizeDescription: Let AI polish your draft while keeping your message and team voice.
composer.aiOptimizePlaceholder: e.g. Make it shorter and more engaging

settings.browserSessionDevHint: Developer tool (dev mode, admins only): point this browser at a different API backend and authenticate with a raw token. In production the backend is fixed to the host that serves the app.
settings.bearerToken: Bearer token (OIDC ID token, bootstrap, or API token)
settings.webSessionTooltip: Created automatically when you sign in through the web UI. It rolls over and expires after 12 h of inactivity.
settings.apiTokensHint: Tokens authenticate as you. Restrict each one to a single team and specific scopes, or leave both open for full access. Use Authorization: Bearer <token> on every request; each value is shown only once.
settings.tokenScopesHint: Leave empty for full access. Selecting scopes restricts the token to those actions.
settings.tokenRevealHint: Copy it now — it is shown only once and cannot be retrieved later.
settings.copyToken: Click the token to copy it
settings.label: Label
settings.confirmRevoke: Are you sure you want to revoke the token "{{label}}"?
settings.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete the token "{{label}}"?
settings.expiryHint: Choose an expiry date in the future (UTC end of day).

aiChat.title: AI Assistant
aiChat.subtitle: Draft posts, set up campaigns and automations.
aiChat.emptyState: How can I help with your social media today?
aiChat.emptyStateHint: Type @ to reference campaigns or automations, / for quick commands.
aiChat.inputPlaceholder: Ask for a post, campaign, or automation…
aiChat.composerScopeExclude: Exclude this account from the edit
aiChat.composerScopeInclude: Include this account in the edit again
aiChat.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
aiChat.commandRss: Create an RSS automation for this feed:

api.role_invalid: role must be one of owner, editor, viewer
api.team_mismatch_url_destinations: team mismatch between URL and destinations
api.target_accounts_same_team: target accounts must stay within the same team as the post
api.content_recurrence_targets_required: content, recurrence_json, and target_account_ids are required
api.expires_at_future: expires_at must be in the future
api.instance_url_invalid_host: instance_url must include a valid host
api.oidc_token_no_id_token: token response did not include id_token (need openid scope and IdP that returns id_token)
api.provider_instance_in_use: provider instance still has connected social accounts
api.ai_not_enabled: AI is not enabled for this team
api.regenerate_blocked_posted: Cannot regenerate: one or more posts in scope are already published or publishing
api.regenerate_no_posts: No regenerable posts found in scope
api.invalid_regenerate_mode: mode must be occurrence or horizon
